measures.name: SVG Card Total Orders
measures.expression: SVG.KpiCard([Total Orders], "Total Orders", "#,##0", FALSE, DimDate[FullDateAlternateKey], DimDate[MonthNumberOfYear])

measures.name: SVG Card Total Revenue
measures.expression: SVG.KpiCard([Total Revenue], "Total Revenue", "$#,##0", FALSE, DimDate[FullDateAlternateKey], DimDate[MonthNumberOfYear])

measures.name: SVG Card Total Profit
measures.expression: SVG.KpiCard([Total Profit], "Total Profit", "$#,##0", FALSE, DimDate[FullDateAlternateKey], DimDate[MonthNumberOfYear])

measures.name: SVG Card RFM Avg Frequency
measures.expression: SVG.KpiCard([RFM Avg Frequency], "RFM Avg Frequency", "#,##0.0", FALSE, DimDate[FullDateAlternateKey], DimDate[MonthNumberOfYear])

measures.name: SVG Card Avg Order Value
measures.expression: SVG.KpiCard([IS Avg Order Value], "Avg Order Value", "$#,##0.00", FALSE, DimDate[FullDateAlternateKey], DimDate[MonthNumberOfYear])

measures.name: SVG Card Churn Customers
measures.expression: SVG.KpiCard([Churn Customers], "Churn Customers", "#,##0", TRUE, DimDate[FullDateAlternateKey], DimDate[MonthNumberOfYear])

measures.name: HTML Card Total Orders
measures.expression:
VAR _current = [Total Orders]
VAR _py = [Total Orders PY]
VAR _yoyChange = _current - _py
VAR _yoyPct = [Total Orders YOY %]
RETURN
'HTML.KpiCard'(
    FORMAT(_current, "#,##0"),
    FORMAT(_py, "#,##0"),
    FORMAT(_yoyPct, "+0.0%;-0.0%;0.0%"),
    _yoyChange,
    "Total Orders",
    "Year to Date",
    "orders"
)

measures.name: HTML Card Total Revenue
measures.expression:
VAR _current = [Total Revenue]
VAR _py = [Total Revenue PY]
VAR _yoyChange = _current - _py
VAR _yoyPct = [Total Revenue YOY %]
RETURN
'HTML.KpiCard'(
    "$" & FORMAT(_current, "#,##0"),
    "$" & FORMAT(_py, "#,##0"),
    FORMAT(_yoyPct, "+0.0%;-0.0%;0.0%"),
    _yoyChange,
    "Total Revenue",
    "Year to Date",
    "revenue"
)

measures.name: HTML Card Total Profit
measures.expression:
VAR _current = [Total Profit]
VAR _py = [Total Profit PY]
VAR _yoyChange = _current - _py
VAR _yoyPct = [Total Profit YOY %]
RETURN
'HTML.KpiCard'(
    "$" & FORMAT(_current, "#,##0"),
    "$" & FORMAT(_py, "#,##0"),
    FORMAT(_yoyPct, "+0.0%;-0.0%;0.0%"),
    _yoyChange,
    "Total Profit",
    "Year to Date",
    "profit"
)
